alert_messages.LOW: Low {risk_type} risk in {district}. Routine monitoring advised.

cholera.HIGH: Pre-position ORS at all health posts. Alert CHWs immediately. Activate water chlorination. Notify district health officer.
cholera.MEDIUM: Increase CHW monitoring visits. Check and treat water sources. Ensure ORS stocks are adequate.
cholera.LOW: Maintain routine surveillance. No immediate action required.

heat.HIGH: Open cooling centres. Distribute oral rehydration salts. Alert health facilities. Suspend outdoor school activities.
heat.MEDIUM: Increase water distribution. Monitor under-5 for dehydration. Advise communities to limit sun exposure.
heat.LOW: Standard heat precautions. Monitor vulnerable households.

flood.HIGH: Evacuate flood-prone areas. Pre-position emergency supplies. Alert schools and clinics. Activate emergency response.
flood.MEDIUM: Prepare evacuation routes. Stock emergency supplies. Monitor water levels daily.
flood.LOW: Monitor rainfall and water levels. Ensure drainage systems are clear.

drought.HIGH: Activate emergency food distribution. Screen all under-5 for malnutrition. Deploy mobile health teams.
drought.MEDIUM: Increase nutrition screening. Distribute water purification supplies. Monitor food prices.
drought.LOW: Routine drought monitoring. Assess water source levels.

malnutrition.HIGH: Open therapeutic feeding centres. Deploy nutrition teams. Alert WFP and UNICEF immediately.
malnutrition.MEDIUM: Increase MUAC screening. Distribute supplementary food. Refer SAM cases immediately.
malnutrition.LOW: Routine nutrition surveillance. Monthly MUAC screening.
